creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
* Ariff Abdullah <ariff@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> On Tue, 20 Nov 2007 09:55:25 +0100
> Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl> wrote:
> > * Ariff Abdullah <ariff@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> > > Try various config options through hint.pcm.%d.config , possibly
> > > gpio0,1,2 , ovref, etc..
> > 
> > I can confirm that setting hint.pcm.0.config to gpio0 the audio
> > output works, but the headjack doesn't, which means rerouting to the
> > headjack is done in software. I'm not an expert when it comes to
> > sound cards. Is this normal? If so, does the snd_hda driver support?
> > 
> 
> Have you tried ovrefXX ? Possibly ovref80, etc. Multiples options can
> be combined, ssv or csv.

ovref and ovref80 have no effect, but if I use ovref50 or ovref100,
audio output also works on the headjack, but it doesn't silence output
on the internal speakers.

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
